Created attachment 179775
patch 1.6.4

portlint:
  looks fine.

poudriere:
  9.3  {amd64, i386} Fails
  10.3 {amd64, i386} OK
  11.0 {amd64, i386, arm} OK
  11.0 {arm64, powerpc} Not tested

make test:

arm64 & powerpc is not tested since I couldn't get poudriere cross compiling to work (C compiler cannot create executables).
